benchmark_protocol.source_generation: Separate process; every warm-up and measured run reused one deterministic source workbook per profile.
benchmark_protocol.representative_policy: Measured run nearest total_editor_ms median; earliest run breaks ties.
benchmark_protocol.verification: Every run passed schema-v11/matrix-v5 telemetry validation, output-plan byte accounting and planned raw compressed-payload equality; representative outputs were checked with openpyxl after benchmark timing.

validation.focused_tests: 4/4 passed: worksheet event reader, worksheet transformer, malformed source failures and public Patch cells
validation.no_images_profile: build and image-disabled runtime smoke passed
validation.install_consumer_smoke: passed for production, stored-only and no-images installations

qualification: Elapsed time is system-sensitive. Claims are limited to the recorded same-machine warmed protocol and are not generalized to arbitrary workbooks, other machines, Office compatibility or full-feature superiority.
